topic.topic: Premier League must protect teams in Europe - Pereira

stories.title: Premier League must protect teams in Europe - Pereira
stories.summary: Nottingham Forest boss Vitor Pereira has urged the Premier League to protect teams playing in Europe by easing their schedules.
